name: Cloudflare R2
description: Cloudflare R2 is S3-compatible object storage with zero egress fees. The API lets you create and manage storage buckets, upload and delete objects, and list bucket contents through Cloudflare's global network.

capabilities.name: create_bucket
capabilities.description: Create a new R2 storage bucket in your Cloudflare account with a specified name and optional location hint.

capabilities.name: list_buckets
capabilities.description: List all R2 storage buckets in your Cloudflare account with their names and creation dates.

capabilities.name: upload_object
capabilities.description: Upload an object to an R2 bucket using the S3-compatible endpoint or the Cloudflare API.

capabilities.name: delete_object
capabilities.description: Delete an object from an R2 bucket by its key name.

capabilities.name: list_objects
capabilities.description: List all objects within an R2 bucket, with optional prefix filtering and pagination support.

capabilities.name: get_bucket
capabilities.description: Retrieve metadata and configuration details for a specific R2 bucket by name.
